seo.title: About Us
seo.description: Learn about ESM Products — a certified women-owned PPE supplier serving food processing, healthcare, and industrial buyers since 1998.

data.headline: West Chicago roots. Nationwide reach.
data.subheadline: Since 1998, ESM Products has supplied disposable PPE to procurement teams who can't afford downtime — with case pricing, lot traceability, and same-day fulfillment on in-stock SKUs.

data.html:
ESM Products grew from a regional glove distributor into a trusted B2B partner for food processors, healthcare systems, and industrial operators across the Midwest and beyond. As a certified women-owned and minority-owned business, we help procurement teams meet diversity spend goals without compromising on quality or service.

Our West Chicago warehouse stocks case-quantity gloves, masks, hairnets, gowns, and our exclusive FDA Gear line — all with published tier pricing and documentation available for vendor qualification packages.

data.headline: Built for regulated environments
data.body: Our FDA Gear brand is engineered for SQF-audited food plants, cleanrooms, and USDA-inspected facilities. Every case is lot-coded for traceability — because your auditor will ask.

data.headline: Ready to set up a business account?
data.subheadline: Get tiered pricing, dedicated support, and contract rates for qualified procurement teams.

seo.title: Contact
seo.description: Contact ESM Products for quotes, account setup, and product questions. Call 630-915-4569 or email sales@esmproducts.com.

data.headline: Talk to a real person in West Chicago
data.subheadline: Whether you need a formal quote, contract pricing, or help choosing the right SKU for your audit program — our team responds same business day.

seo.title: FAQ
seo.description: Frequently asked questions about ESM Products ordering, shipping, case pricing, and FDA Gear compliance.

data.headline: Frequently asked questions
data.subheadline: Answers for procurement teams, plant managers, and operations buyers.

items.question: What is the minimum order quantity?
items.answer: Most SKUs have a minimum order of 1 case. Case quantities vary by product — typically 500 to 2,000 units per case. MOQ is shown on each product page.

items.question: Do you offer volume discounts?
items.answer: Yes. Published tier pricing is available on product pages. Qualified accounts may receive custom contract rates — contact sales for a formal quote.

items.question: Can I request a formal quote for vendor approval?
items.answer: Absolutely. Use the contact form or call 630-915-4569. We provide quotes with SKU details, case pricing, and lead times for your procurement workflow.

items.question: How fast do in-stock orders ship?
items.answer: In-stock cases ship within 1 business day from our West Chicago warehouse. Made-to-order lines have transparent lead times listed at checkout.

items.question: Do you ship nationwide?
items.answer: Yes. We ship throughout the United States via common carriers. Midwest and Great Lakes customers benefit from reduced transit times from our regional hub.

items.question: What is FDA Gear?
items.answer: FDA Gear is ESM's exclusive line of food-safe PPE — bouffants, hairnets, aprons, and apparel engineered for regulated environments with 21 CFR compliant materials and lot-coded cases.

items.question: Are lot numbers available for audits?
items.answer: Yes. FDA Gear cases include lot numbers for traceability. Documentation is available on request for SQF, USDA, and vendor qualification packages.

data.headline: Still have questions?
data.subheadline: Our West Chicago sales team responds same business day — by phone, email, or contact form.

seo.title: Terms & Conditions
seo.description: Terms and conditions for purchasing from ESM Products.

data.html:
1. Orders & acceptance

All orders are subject to acceptance by ESM Products. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders for any reason, including product availability, pricing errors, or suspected fraudulent activity.

2. Pricing

Prices are listed per case in USD unless otherwise noted. Published prices may change without notice. Contract pricing applies only to approved business accounts with signed agreements.

3. Payment

Payment terms are net 30 for approved accounts unless otherwise agreed. First-time orders may require prepayment. All invoices are due per agreed payment terms.

4. Shipping & risk of loss

Title and risk of loss pass to the buyer upon delivery to the carrier. Shipping charges are calculated at checkout based on weight, destination, and service level.

5. Returns

Due to the nature of disposable PPE, returns are accepted only for defective or mis-shipped products within 14 days of delivery. Contact sales@esmproducts.com to initiate a return authorization.

6. Limitation of liability

ESM Products' liability is limited to the purchase price of the products ordered. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

seo.title: Privacy Policy
seo.description: How ESM Products collects, uses, and protects your information.

data.html:
Information we collect

We collect information you provide when creating an account, placing an order, or contacting us — including name, company, email, phone, shipping address, and order history.

How we use your information

We use your information to process orders, provide customer support, send order confirmations, and — with your consent — share product updates and promotional offers relevant to business accounts.

Cookies

We use essential cookies to maintain your cart and session. Optional analytics cookies help us improve our storefront. You can manage preferences via the cookie banner.

Data sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with service providers necessary to fulfill orders (carriers, payment processors) and as required by law.

Contact

For privacy questions, email sales@esmproducts.com or call 630-915-4569.

seo.title: Disclaimer
seo.description: Product and website disclaimer for ESM Products.

data.headline: Disclaimer
data.subheadline: Important information about product use, specifications, and website content.

data.html:
Product information

Product descriptions, specifications, and images on this website are provided for general reference. Always verify SKU details, case quantities, and compliance documentation against your internal requirements before placing an order.

No professional advice

Content on this site does not constitute legal, regulatory, or safety advice. Customers are responsible for determining suitability of products for their intended use and operating environment.

Availability & pricing

Inventory levels and published case pricing may change without notice. ESM Products reserves the right to correct pricing errors and limit quantities.

External links

Links to third-party sites are provided for convenience. ESM Products is not responsible for the content or policies of external websites.

Contact

For clarification on product specifications or compliance documentation, contact sales@esmproducts.com or call 630-915-4569.
